indicators.name: ma20
indicators.description: 20-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: ma5
indicators.description: 5-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: ma10
indicators.description: 10-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: ma30
indicators.description: 30-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: ma60
indicators.description: 60-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: ma120
indicators.description: 120-trading-day moving average of close price

indicators.name: close_above_ma20_flag
indicators.description: Whether close price is above MA20 on the snapshot date

indicators.name: volatility_60d
indicators.description: 60-trading-day realized volatility

indicators.name: amount_ratio_20d
indicators.description: Current amount divided by 20-day average amount

indicators.name: amount_ratio_prev_20d
indicators.description: Current amount divided by the preceding 20-trading-day average amount

indicators.name: volume_ratio_5d_20d
indicators.description: Recent 5-day average volume divided by recent 20-day average volume

indicators.name: close_new_high_60d_flag
indicators.description: Whether close price reaches a 60-trading-day high

indicators.name: close_to_high_60d_pct
indicators.description: Close distance to the latest 60-trading-day close high; negative means below the high

indicators.name: convergence_5_10_20_pct
indicators.description: MA5/MA10/MA20 convergence percentage

indicators.name: ma20_slope_20d
indicators.description: Relative MA20 slope over the latest 20 trading days

indicators.name: ma20_deviation_pct
indicators.description: Relative deviation of close price versus MA20; used to avoid overextended entries

indicators.name: ma30_deviation_pct
indicators.description: Relative deviation of close price versus MA30; hard cap uses 35%, preferred high-quality zone uses 25%

indicators.name: ma30_hold_ratio_90d
indicators.description: Ratio of recent 90 trading days where close is above MA30; pre-breakout hard threshold starts at 75%

indicators.name: ma30_hold_ratio_30d
indicators.description: Ratio of recent 30 trading days where close is above MA30; used by base-breakout/recent-repair diagnostics

indicators.name: ma30_hold_ratio_60d
indicators.description: Ratio of recent 60 trading days where close is above MA30; used to separate sustained trend from newly repaired trend

indicators.name: avg_amount_20d
indicators.description: 20-trading-day average amount; steady-uptrend watch uses at least 200 million yuan as the first liquidity gate

indicators.name: max_turnover_rate_20d
indicators.description: Maximum daily turnover rate over the latest 20 trading days; used to exclude extreme turnover spikes above 20%

indicators.name: context_strength_pass
indicators.description: Whether the stock belongs to at least one strong industry or strong concept; strong means trend-strong OR heat-strong

indicators.name: max_drawdown_60d
indicators.description: Maximum close-to-close drawdown over the latest 60 trading days

indicators.name: max_drawdown_120d
indicators.description: Maximum close-to-close drawdown over the latest 120 trading days

indicators.name: red_k_ratio_20d
indicators.description: Ratio of bars where close is greater than or equal to open over the latest 20 trading days

indicators.name: green_k_ratio_20d
indicators.description: Ratio of bars where close is below open over the latest 20 trading days

indicators.name: long_shadow_ratio_20d
indicators.description: Average shadow-to-range ratio over the latest 20 trading days

indicators.name: weekly_ma5
indicators.description: 5-week moving average of weekly close from the published weekly statistic口径, aligned as-of signal date

indicators.name: weekly_ma10
indicators.description: 10-week moving average of weekly close from the published weekly statistic口径, aligned as-of signal date

indicators.name: weekly_ma20
indicators.description: 20-week moving average of weekly close from the published weekly statistic口径, aligned as-of signal date

indicators.name: weekly_ma20_slope_4w
indicators.description: Relative weekly MA20 slope over the latest 4 weekly bars; should reuse the same rolling MA slope口径 as existing weekly MA statistics

indicators.name: weekly_max_drawdown_26w
indicators.description: Maximum close-to-close drawdown over the latest 26 weekly bars; production should reuse the existing rolling statistic口径 family rather than a strategy-local calculation

indicators.name: weekly_trend_pass
indicators.description: Whether weekly trend context passes for the daily signal date; can be materialized upstream after weekly component indicators are published
